goal: 整合 I2 source-aware storage 实现

summary.title: 整合 I2 source-aware storage 实现
summary.what: Merged the verified I2 source-aware storage slice into the canonical workflow branch and updated the workflow control plane to make I3 ready.
summary.why: I3 CLI source option behavior depends on the merged selector, coverage, DB identity, query/read, and migration contract from I2.
summary.user_goal: 整合 I2 source-aware storage 实现

decisions.chose: Merged worker commit d36fb22 with merge commit cfa34f3 instead of squashing it.
decisions.rationale: Preserving the worker commit keeps the I2 implementation, proof, handoff, and Mainline seal traceable.
rejected: Squashing I2 into a control-plane commit would hide the implementation proof boundary.

decisions.chose: Marked I3 ready only after worker proof and canonical npm run check both passed.
decisions.rationale: I3 needs a stable merged source-aware storage contract before wiring public CLI flags.
rejected: Launching I3 against an unmerged worker branch would create unclear handoff and conflict risk.

review_notes: Actual integration commits are cfa34f3 and 883c5c6 on codex/session-sources-workflow; the broader file list in prepare output comes from the full workflow stack relative to origin/main.
Canonical verification after merge: npm run check passed with 27 test files and 148 tests; git diff --check passed.

architectural_claims: Codex remains the default public source while storage/query internals are source-qualified.
Canonical selectors include source and coverage implication is false across sources.
behavioral_changes: Existing Codex workflows continue with default source codex.
Internal query/read/delete/replace paths are now scoped by source identity.

data_model_changes.name: sessions/messages/coverage SQLite schema
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Backfills old Codex rows to source_id=codex and preserves old messages during session table rebuild.

migration_notes: INDEX_VERSION bumped to cxs-v7-source-identity by I2 worker slice.
FTS cleanup uses rowid/session_id rather than bare native session_uuid.
